title: Incremental State Machines, Concurrency, Cancellation, and Ownership · Failure Repair Bay
summary: An incident engineer receives a plausible but defective explicit protocol state, event, invariant, and ownership model; retain the raw transcript, isolate the first divergent state, and preserve a regression corpus entry. Planned artifact: Repair a changed failure in explicit protocol state, event, invariant, and ownership model and publish the reproduction, evidence, repair, and regression record. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, a…
objectives: Represent protocol phase, required input, transition, emitted event, retained buffer, limit, and terminal result explicitly across fragmented reads.
Define invariants for cursor bounds, monotonic consumption, one framing choice, one response order, one close owner, and no effects before validation.
Assign one coordinated reader and ordered writer per HTTP/1.1 connection with explicit handoff for tunnels and shutdown.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

steps.title: Inspect the failure record · Debug Incremental State Machine
steps.instruction:
debug case — A debug protocol team handles case 6760 in a municipal gateway receiving one-byte TCP fragments. Build deterministic Go evidence to enforce cursor, framing, reader, and terminal ownership invariants; preserve this operating constraint: diagnostics must omit credentials and attacker-controlled metric labels; then block extra QPACK streams and fall back without removing HTTP/2 availability. Browser code models bounded byte and state decisions only. Sockets, listeners, live TLS, proxies, packet capture, fuzz campaigns, races, load, HTTP/2, HTTP/3, and production behavior require explicit authorized transfer gates. Competency probe: Represent protocol phase, required input, transition, emitted event, retained buffer, limit, and terminal result explicitly across fragmented reads.

Inspect the Incremental State Machine trace for this debug case. Which record connects a precondition, observed state change, and boundary result?

Evidence target: Inspect the failure record · Debug Incremental State Machine.
steps.why: The decision supplies observable evidence for represent protocol phase, required input, transition, emitted event, retained buffer, limit, and terminal result explicitly across fragmented reads. For Inspect the failure record · Debug Incremental State Machine, keep Incremental State Machine connected to executable Go behavior evidence.

Competency probe: Record low-cardinality phase, framing source, bytes, duration, terminal reason, peer class, and correlation without raw secrets or attacker-controlled labels.

For Publish the incident record · Debug State Observability, challenge the documented misconception with runtime, failure, race, or toolchain evidence: Logging the entire raw message is the only way to diagnose parser state failures.
